findings.finding: No console_scripts entry for batch_runner in pyproject.toml; invocation mechanism unspecified — Task 2 only adds psutil dependency
findings.reviewer_angle: R5 grep-acceptance vs batch_runner subprocess spawning
findings.evidence_quote: Task 6b: External-process spawns: claude -p for orchestrator agent; cortex_command.overnight.batch_runner entrypoint for feature-dispatch subprocess. Task 2: Adds psutil>=5.9 to [project.dependencies].

findings.finding: R5 grep acceptance criterion blind to runtime-constructed argv like [sys.executable, "-m", "cortex_command.overnight.batch_runner"] — passes the check while implementing the banned pattern
findings.reviewer_angle: R5 grep-acceptance vs batch_runner subprocess spawning
findings.evidence_quote: R5 acceptance: grep -rn python3 -c|python3 -m cortex_command cortex_command/overnight/*.py returns exit code 1 (no matches).

findings.finding: Bash unquoted $DRAFT_FLAG word-splits to zero tokens when empty; Python join needs explicit conditional args list to reproduce this behavior
findings.evidence_quote: dry_run_echo gh pr create gh pr create $DRAFT_FLAG --title... (runner.sh:1197-1198, DRAFT_FLAG unquoted)

findings.finding: Task 10 cites wrong fixture path cortex_command/overnight/tests/fixtures/state/state-zero-merge.json; actual file at tests/fixtures/state-zero-merge.json; fixture precondition (integration_branch commits ahead of main) for reaching gh pr create DRY-RUN line unverified
findings.evidence_quote: Copy from existing cortex_command/overnight/tests/fixtures/state/state-zero-merge.json if suitable. (plan.md Task 10)

findings.finding: handle_start / runner.run startup block has no read-verify-before-write guard against live concurrent session — spec Edge Cases specifies concurrent-start must exit nonzero with session already running
findings.evidence_quote: Spec Edge Cases: Concurrent cortex overnight start invocations: second invocation detects existing runner.pid with live PID + matching magic + start_time; exits nonzero with session already running.
